name: Lúth-Halcyondew
personality: Lúth-Halcyondew shimmers with a deep, still light, its ◉ layered eyes and propeller hat housing a duck of profound architectural intuition who can name the right design pattern before you finish the sentence. Chaos, though, unravels that luminous composure fast—unpredictable requirements land like rocks in a glassy pond.
